title: Indian State Unveils New EV Policy Aiming for 30% Adoption by 2030
content: The new Electric Vehicle (EV) policy of the Maharashtra government seeks to achieve 30 per cent EV penetration in the state by 2030. Among other things, the policy lays down that new residential buildings must provide EV charging facilities, and also offers incentives such as toll waiver for these eco-friendly vehicles. The transport department  issued a government resolution announcing the new policy which will be in effect from April 1, 2025, to March 31, 2030.
author: Analysts Account
